game_info.title: v1
game_info.concept:
Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him.  Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/downwell/id1032708262

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him. Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks. Step into precariously placed shops and buy some helpful items or level up between levels to battle well-dwelling monsters and uncover hidden caves filled with riches and relics. No two trips down the well are ever the same!

Simple, Responsive Controls - Designed for mobile from the ground up, Downwell is presented with intuitive and elegant controls that allow for action-packed gameplay using just three buttons.

The Amazing Gunboots - The fashionable and lethal Gunboots allow players to unleash a torrent of firepower on the nasty creatures dwelling in the well and slow your decent with each shot. 

Unique Weapons & Items - Get different weapons, shop for peculiar items and obtain powerful upgrades that all stack and affect the way you play!

A New Adventure Every Time - Each level in Downwell is procedurally generated, so no two trips down the well are ever the same providing a fresh new adventure each time!

Music by Eirik Suhrke. 
Sound Design by Joonas Turner.
game_info.description: You are a treasure hunter falling down a deep, monster-filled well. Armed only with your Gunboots, you must descend deeper into the darkness. Jump from platforms to navigate, and while in mid-air, use your Gunboots to shoot downwards, eliminating enemies and slowing your descent. Collect red gems for points and managing your ammo is crucial—it only recharges when you land on solid ground. Reach the bottom of the well alive!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Move horizontally
- Space: Jump (from ground) / Shoot Gunboots (in air)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (after Game Over)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and basic physics mechanics (gravity and collision).
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will move the player right and jump. It checks if the player leaves the ground and eventually lands back on a platform or falls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player Y position changes (decreases then increases), state transitions from grounded to aerial and back, demonstrating gravity and collision handling.

TEST_1.expected: Player Y position changes (decreases then increases), state transitions from grounded to aerial and back, demonstrating gravity and collision handling.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify Gunboots shooting and ammo mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The player will jump and repeatedly fire while in mid-air. The controller will track ammo depletion.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Projectiles are spawned, ammo decreases to 0, and the player's descent slows due to recoil forces.

TEST_2.expected: Projectiles are spawned, ammo decreases to 0, and the player's descent slows due to recoil forces.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The player will navigate towards an enemy without shooting to test collision damage.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player health decreases upon collision with an enemy. Game enters GAME_OVER_LOSE if health hits 0.

TEST_3.expected: Player health decreases upon collision with an enemy. Game enters GAME_OVER_LOSE if health hits 0.

TEST_4.strategy_description: The player moves to intersect with a known gem location generated in the test seed.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Score increases and the gem entity is removed from the game state.

TEST_5.test_description: Stress test particle system and entity management.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Rapidly fire and destroy entities to generate maximum particles.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Frame rate remains stable (close to 60 FPS) and no memory leaks or crashes occur with high entity counts.

TEST_6.test_description: Verify Game Over and Restart functionality.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Intentionally die, wait for Game Over screen, then press R to restart.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE, then back to START (or PLAYING) upon reset, with variables (health, score) reset to initial values.
TEST_6.description: Verify Game Over and Restart functionality.
TEST_6.strategy: Intentionally die, wait for Game Over screen, then press R to restart.
TEST_6.expected: Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE, then back to START (or PLAYING) upon reset, with variables (health, score) reset to initial values.
